title: Refactor deaddrop_post ctx lookup and OSCORE enforcement to match CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE policy
close_reason: Refactored deaddrop_post ctx lookup to remove duplicate oscore_ctx_get_by_eui64 call after payload handling, guarded OSCORE paths with #ifdef CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE to match keys/coap_server policy, fixed sender_iid reference to peer_eui64[7], ensured local_admin check only applies to non-OSCORE paths, and preserved protected response paths for rate-limit/store/success cases. Verified structure consistent with confessions_post and keys handlers. No subbeads created.
